name: Breskvica
description: '''Anđela Ignjatović''' ({{lang-sr-Cyrl|Анђела Игњатовић}}; born 19 May 2001), known professionally as '''Breskvica''' ({{lang-sr-Cyrl|Брескaвица|links=no}}, {{IPA|sr|brêskvitsa|pron}}, {{lit|Little Peach}}), is a [[Serbia|Serbian]] singer. She debuted in 2019 with the single "Utopia" and subsequently rose to further popularity by collaborating with her then-boyfriend, [[Voyage (rapper)|Voyage]]. Following their breakup, Breskvica pursued a solo career with the single "Srećan put" in 2021. She is known for performing both [[urban music|urban]] and [[folk music|folk]]-influenced popular music.
